name: coverageMap
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). COMPONENT-EXACT shape: panel sends {artifact:{data:{towers}}}; dispatch peels the wrapper. RETURNS either {message} (empty towers) or {towers,activeTowers,totalCoverageKm2,technologies} — the exact keys the CovResult card renders. totalCoverageKm2 = Σ π·rangeKm²; technologies is the de-duped set. POISON: per-tower rangeKm via num() so 'Infinity'/'1e999' collapse to the finite default (5); totalCoverageKm2 stays FINITE. Pure compute, no STATE. Pinned by server/tests/telecommunications-lens-macros.test.js.
